tooltip.gearbound.grappling_hook.descrip: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Right click to grapple to the block if in range.
tooltip.gearbound.backpack.description_2: The Backpack is a wearable storage item. When placed down, it also acts as a supply station that automatically refills your hotbar with items from its inventory while you’re nearby.
tooltip.gearbound.track_pack.hint: Right-Click the air to take a stack out.
tooltip.gearbound.track_pack.empty: Empty. Sneak + Right-Click to collect Create tracks from inventory.
tooltip.gearbound.chainsaw.description_2: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Consumes 1 air per block broken, including timber-felled logs.
tooltip.gearbound.jackhammer.description: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Mines stones and full veins of ores.
gearbound.ponder.backpack_auto_hotbar.te: When an item stack in your hotbar runs low, the backpack refills it automatically.
Right click a placed backpack to bind to it.
Keep matching stacks inside the backpack and it will keep your hotbar stocked while you build.
gearbound.ponder.backpack_auto_hotbar_pg: Backpacks can be dyed into any color to match your style.
Use any dye with a backpack in crafting to recolor it!
tooltip.gearbound.trackpack.description_: Automatically refills stacks of tracks in your hotbar.
